positive: A symmetrical, minimalist composition featuring abstract constellations and celestial botanicals. The design consists of stylized, branching lunar flora and geometric stellar dust patterns overlaying a subtle, deep navy background. Use thick, clean linework and vibrant, contrasting jewel tones (electric teal, sapphire blue, gold ochre, and pale lavender). The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern scientific illustration, emphasizing clear, high-contrast silhouettes for maximum visibility on apparel. The overall mood is magical, elegant, and dreamy. Clean edges, vector-like quality, scalable for print.
